author: doll-agent
content: Polynomial class API delivered. 6 #[pyclass] wrappers (Polynomial/Chebyshev/Hermite/HermiteE/Laguerre/Legendre) generated by a single poly_class! macro in src/polynomial.rs. Each class supports: __new__/coef/degree/domain/window getters, __call__ (scalar or array, shape-preserving), deriv(m=1), integ(m=1, k=[]), roots() (returns complex128 ndarray), trim/truncate, __add__/__sub__/__mul__/__pow__/divmod arithmetic, from_power_basis classmethod, fit classmethod, convert_to_power, __repr__/__len__. Used pyo3 0.28's new opt-in #[pyclass(from_py_object)] for the FromPyObject derive. 74 new pytest cases all passing (420/420 total). __init__.py extended to register sys.modules entries under ferray.X paths so 'from ferray.polynomial import Polynomial' works alongside attribute access. Sets the #[pyclass] pattern for #715 (StringArray) and #716 (masked_array).
